description_long: This is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, tapered blade made of metallic material, likely steel, giving it a silvery-gray appearance. The blade is symmetrical and extends to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The crossguard is black and slightly curved, providing hand protection and a visual contrast to the blade. The handle is cylindrical, featuring a subtle ergonomic contour and a rounded pommel at the end, with a brownish grip section that may be wrapped or textured for better handling. The overall design is functional with minimal ornamentation, suggesting a utilitarian or medieval-inspired weapon. No sheath or scabbard is present in the images.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a metallic blade, black crossguard, and a contoured handle with a rounded pommel. The design is functional and minimally decorated.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, black crossguard, and the handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, contoured, brown grip, rounded pommel
